Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 151 upvotes, 12 comments
  2. The Social Smolnet 89 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Attention Residuals 49 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 683 upvotes, 233 comments
  5. The Soul of a Pedicab Driver 124 upvotes, 35 comments
  6. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 379 upvotes, 129 comments
  7. Randomization in Controlled Experiments 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg 132 upvotes, 47 comments
  9. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 157 upvotes, 59 comments
  10. Regex Blaster 119 upvotes, 48 comments
  11. VisiCalc Reconstructed 133 upvotes, 55 comments
  12. Super Micro Shares Plunge 25% After Co-Founder Charged in $2.5B Smuggling Plot 252 upvotes, 117 comments
  13. Parallel Perl – autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT 78 upvotes, 30 comments
  14. FSF statement on copyright infringement lawsuit Bartz v. Anthropic 225 upvotes, 107 comments
  15. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 235 upvotes, 128 comments
  16. Chuck Norris has died 643 upvotes, 387 comments
  17. Just Put It on a Map 120 upvotes, 61 comments
  18. Show HN: Sonar – A tiny CLI to see and kill whatever's running on localhost 106 upvotes, 60 comments
  19. HP trialed mandatory 15-minute support call wait times (2025) 281 upvotes, 181 comments
  20. Too Much Color 88 upvotes, 49 comments
  21. 90% of crypto's Illinois primary spending failed to achieve its objective 111 upvotes, 77 comments
  22. I'm OK being left behind, thanks 719 upvotes, 608 comments
  23. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 361 upvotes, 318 comments
  24. Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis 12 upvotes, 5 comments
  25. The worst volume control UI in the world 21 upvotes, 12 comments
  26. Java is fast, code might not be 155 upvotes, 157 comments
  27. Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility 24 upvotes, 20 comments
  29. BYD's bet on EVs is paying off as drivers ditch gas amid rising oil prices 130 upvotes, 189 comments
  30. Our commitment to Windows quality 69 upvotes, 92 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 21 March 2026. Source here.
